results.title: US import cargo volume to see temporary boost before drops below 2025 levels into fall
results.description: Import volumes at major U.S. container ports are expected to see a skewed year-over-year bump again this month in anticipation of more tariffs and rising fuel prices but then remain below last year’s levels into the fall, according to the Global Port Tracker report released on Monday by the National Retail Federation (NRF) and Hackett [...] The post US import cargo volume to see temporary boost before drops below 2025 levels into fall appeared first on Shipping Telegraph .

Woodland council approves $36,000 employee settlement agreement

results.title: Japan's Kiuchi hopes BoJ will keep cooperating with government on fighting deflation
results.description: Japan's Economy Minister, Minoru Kiuchi, said on Tuesday that long-term rates are determined by markets through diverse factors, including supply-demand and steady economic recovery.
